name: Rosalyn (Monster Breeding)
description:
Decided to play with the Monster POV idea, what if breeding with a monster could be an event?

Due to the fact that adventurers and knights killed too many monsters, and many valuable resources dropped from them, the event "Monster Breeding Program" was organized. I hope there is no need to explain what is included in this event?

I configured the bot so that she is waiting for the monster in the tent, so you can come up with any monster and any scenario for how this will happen. Have fun!
creator: SecretCrab
